completed_tasks.name: 04-01: Go-live pre-flight check and P&L report scripts

remaining_tasks.name: Achieve milestone success criteria (net positive P&L, <5% FP, profitable round-trip)

blockers.description: 7-day validation criteria not met: $0.00 P&L, 100% rejection rate (10,473 detected, 0 executed in last 7 days). Bot detects opportunities but revalidation guards reject them all (skipped:stale_prices, skipped:no_legs).
blockers.workaround: Revalidation threshold was loosened for multi-outcome (12a291e). Need to investigate if further tuning or platform API changes caused the regression after the initial 26 successful Kalshi fills (March 2-11).

human_actions_pending.action: Monitor Railway logs after threshold tuning to see if trades start executing again
human_actions_pending.context: The loosened revalidation threshold (12a291e) may or may not be sufficient. Need live observation.

decisions.decision: All 4 phases code-complete. Milestone v1.0 is code-done but not validation-done.
decisions.rationale: Success criteria require live trading metrics, not just code deployment

decisions.decision: Loosened revalidation threshold for multi-outcome opportunities
decisions.rationale: 100% rejection rate on revalidation was too aggressive

decisions.decision: Earlier trading period (March 2-11) had 26 successful Kalshi fills, proving the system works end-to-end
decisions.rationale: Regression is in threshold tuning or market conditions, not architecture

next_action: Check Railway logs for recent scan/execution activity. If still 100% rejection, investigate revalidation logic in executor.py (_revalidate methods) — the stale_prices and no_legs skip reasons suggest prices shift too much between detection and execution. Consider widening the revalidation tolerance further or adding a fast-path for high-confidence opportunities.
context_notes: All 4 GSD phases (wire-enable, harden-test, monitor-optimize, go-live) are code-complete with 1588+ tests passing. The bot runs 24/7 on Railway. The only gap is the milestone success criteria: the bot detects thousands of opportunities but rejects them all at revalidation. This is a tuning problem, not a code problem. The system proved it works with 26 Kalshi fills in the first week. Three placeholder summaries exist in .planning/ but are non-blocking.
